programme.title: Peking Opera Blues [Cantonese-Language Version]
programme.desc: The movie is set in chaotic 1920's China, when warlords fought each other for power while Sun Yat-Sen's underground movement tried to establish a democratic republic.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, a human skull retrieved from an Ohio pond reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate that the victim had been stabbed multiple times and that the teeth had been removed with needle-nose pliers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The probe of a woman's attempt on her husband's life leads to a fertility doctor with a high rate of success.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Expelled from an exclusive boys school, an underprivileged youth, a gifted student, is suspected of a trustee's murder.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The stabbing murder of a husband and wife prompts Briscoe and Logan to investigate Steven Bartlett, an alcoholic who was abused as a child.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After learning controversial therapy may have caused an autistic's death, McCoy must discredit the main witness.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a fellow detective and childhood friend forces Logan to deal with repressed memories about the school he attended.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigations of seemingly unrelated murders of a cab driver and a hit man lead Briscoe and Logan to the cabbie's wife.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives arrest the father of a woman with multiple personalities for the murder of a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A newly elected, gay councilman's companion and his ousted opponent are suspects in the politician's murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A murder victim's mother fatally wounds the prime suspect in the case; then evidence suggests the woman hired her daughter's assailant.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis seeks someone on the Internet with information about a wealthy collegian's murder in a biker bar.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When McCoy and Kincaid disagree, Schiff must decide whether or not to ask for the death penalty in the murder of an undercover drug agent.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a triple murder case ends with the suspect's acquittal, McCoy and Kincaid investigate the judge assigned to the trial.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When Briscoe and Curtis capture a couple after a violent crime spree, the woman claims she was forced to commit the crimes against her will.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and his new partner investigate murder at a college; McCoy risks a lawyer's disbarment to win a case.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Kincaid prosecutes a case alone when she is certain that a prominent plastic surgeon who is accused of murdering a prostitute is guilty.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus divertidas aventuras. Desde paseos en camión hasta misterios con calcetines, zapatos apestosos, magia con helados, rugidos de dinosaurios, la hora de dormir y los superpoderes de mamá: ¡un día de diversión e imaginación!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para un día de diversión! Desde cantar con globos hasta imitar sonidos de animales, canciones infantiles, partes del cuerpo, citas con el abuelo, sueños de dinosaurios y confiar en el médico, ¡es un día de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally's soccer game is obstructed by a large log that they can't lift out of the way.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: The kids are making bubbles and want to save one for Sally's mom. But they always pop. In Odds-n-Endsville they find out that landing bubbles on some surfaces helps the bubbles last longer.

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Wild Caribbean: Rhythms of Life
programme.desc: In the waters of the Caribbean, no animal can make it through life without a strategy for survival.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean: Rhythms of Life
programme.desc: When volcanoes burst from the ocean, they attract unique life forms to their jungle valleys and black sandy beaches, and create deep chasms that pods of whales enjoy.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: Battling wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring; visiting a rescue centre, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild; an Amazonian duck gets a miraculous operation.

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: The south-eastern coast of New Zealand is the place for young marine animals to transition from novices to independent adults; young whales, dolphins and seals learn to hunt, learn the rules of society, or strike out on their own adventures.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean: Rhythms of Life
programme.desc: These Caribbean coasts and islands are made out of once-living creatures, and are now a labyrinth of life.

programme.title: Under the Sea
programme.desc: Observe the risky, clever methods that marine families use to create new life.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue

programme.title: Hot life in Africa

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Predators Playbook
programme.desc: The astonishing speed, agility and camouflage of nature's most skilled predators, from wily Komodo dragons to elusive Amazon leaf fish.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca remembers the first time she meets Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot in the head by a drone fighter. With the death of its target, the Lupin Game is concluded. Time passes, and people forget about the game. Released from his duty of hunting Lupin, Ami now lives with Zenigata, when one day Goemon visits her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: The "Smart Safe" has come to the Greater Tokyo Bank. Lupin is goaded by Fujiko and Jigen to try and crack the technological wonder. What can he do against this peculiarly secure safe?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is hired by Gaston to retrieve a painting, and manages to do so easily enough... except the painting has a strange resemblance to a real Picasso piece, forcing Lupin to examine the truth behind why he was hired.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin visits Gaston's grave. There he meets the elderly Camille, with who he goes out for a drink when the pub's phone begins to ring. On the other end of the line is the supposedly dead Gaston.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot, and Albert gets his hands on the notebook. Lupin is saved by Jigen and Goemon and manages to survive his injuries under care. He then explains his past with Albert and how they know each other.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: After learning the shocking truth about Jose's terrifying plot, Lupin heads to Jose's headquarters with Albert, his old thieving comrade. Jigen and Goemon fight off the heaviest opposition while Lupin and Albert head into the heart of the enemy territory.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: To steal the fortune of the Drug King Pablo, the gang heads to South America with Fujiko. As Fujiko distracts the target, Lupin picks off the remains of Pablo's guards while making his way through the jungle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: In a rural town in France, full of cosplayers. Within the town celebrating a pop-cultural event is Goemon. Next to the inn, he decides to keep watch at is Chloé's Bistro. Chloé is exactly the woman Goemon was looking for Lupin's current target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Having enrolled at the Annecy School for Girls, Ami encounters a strange girl in the garden who aims her bow at a crow. The girl is Dolma, the princess of the Kingdom of Padar. Having no friends, Ami finds herself opening up to the odd Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Princess Dolma, please save Padar." With that request, Dolma is taken home. Lupin follows shortly, and Ami decides to accompany Fujiko to Padar in order to save Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is pierced by Dolma's arrow. Ami and Fujiko take Lupin and escape, hiding in a deserted building. The three of them decide to flee, with Lupin badly injured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Padar sinks into chaos because of the civil war, but things take a sudden turn when the Shake Hands company gets involved. A proclamation by the king is posted online, proving him to be alive.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "I want you to find out who killed my husband." Three years ago, someone shot Count Maupassant to death.

programme.desc: King Friday recites his kingly version of Twinkle Twinkle Little Star as Prince Tuesday struggles to write a poem of his own. Mrs. McFeely is watching a litter of sixteen-day-old puppies and explains the care that they need.

programme.desc: Mr. McFeely brings a video showing how people make vacuum cleaners.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito y Gato hacen una fiesta el mismo día, pero todos los invitados, incluyendo a Perro, se van a la fiesta de Tito debido a la mala comida y aburridos juegos que hizo Gato. / Gato entrena a Perro para que corra en una competencia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En la pelea por un inmenso diamante, CatDog crea un terremoto y deben trabajar juntos para escapar de los túneles que están a punto de colapsar. / Mientras se divierte en un basurero de la ciudad Perro encuentra una cucaracha herida.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito le cuenta a Gato un secreto que Shriek está enamorada de Perro. Gato ve una oportunidad para tener de su lado a los Grasosos. / Perro y Gato consiguieron trabajo como lamedores en una compañía de cereal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cuando Perro desobedece las normas de la piscina de la comunidad, él y Gato son arrestados por el guardavidas y los llevan a prisión. / Gato se ve consumido al coleccionar figuras. A medida que su colección crece las figuras le hablan.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: ¿Es el final de Gato y Perro? Cansados de ser un dos cabezas, Gato decide hacerse una cirugía para separarse de Perro. / Perro y Gato una vez más corren por sus vidas de los Perros Grasosos hacia la seguridad de su casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La amiga por carta de Gato, Ingrid, viene a visitarlo y Gato le dijo en sus cartas que, entre otras cosas, él era un gato normal. / Un nuevo cartero exigente llega a la ciudad. Deja el correo antes de que Perro pueda perseguirlo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que solo tiene una vida a diferencia de las nueve vidas de Gato, Perro se pone obsesivo con la seguridad. / Cansado de los modos paternales de Gato, Perro se escapa de la casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Aparecen nuevos vecinos extraños en la casa de enfrente y Perro, obsesionado con los cómics de ciencia ficción, cree que son alienígenas. / Luego de estar despiertos toda la noche, Perro se queda dormido en el día durante una entrevista.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato audiciona para la producción musical de Abe Lincoln: superestrella, pero es abatido cuando Perro obtiene el papel principal y él tiene que ser el burro. / Perro descubre que otro canino violó su toma de agua preferida.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato tienen la misión de encontrar a la Ardilla que arruinó los vegetales de Gato y robó los huesos de Perro. / Perro vuelve a sus viejos trucos, esta vez, persiguiendo a un avión que está aterrizando en el Aeropuerto.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato saca un libro viejo de los gatos en la historia, para enseñarle a Perro sobre la realeza felina en Egipto. / Tito encuentra a Gato en el acto de querer leer el diario de Perro y lo chantajea convirtiéndolo así en su esclavo personal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En un esfuerzo por conseguir que Perro la mire, Shriek, la perra grasosa, va a la escuela de encantos de Randolph. / Perro, sin darse cuenta, salva a Rancio, el conejo, de ser aplastado por la hamburguesa más grande del mundo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro se agarra de su barrilete mientras va volando, arrastrando a Gato con él, el barrilete vuela sobre el océano y cae sobre una isla. / Perro y Gato forman una banda de rock para poder competir en la Batalla de Bandas de Nearburg.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cliff, el perro grasoso, deja a su sobrina bebé al cuidado de Gato. /Gato se une a un club exclusivo de gatos. /Gato y Perro se suben al escenario y cantan sobre como se llevan bien.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Jugando al béisbol en la arena, Perro es una superestrella. / Perro y Gato practican sus movimientos de cha cha cha para la próxima fiesta de baile./ Perro y Gato, en su primera carrera de esquí, causan caos.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato intenta enseñarle a Perro los puntos principales del golf. / Perro está con un caso grave de estornudos y el doctor Rancio, el conejo, le diagnostica a Perro una alergia de gatos.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Para ahorrar dinero en facturas de electricidad, Gato engancha el perro hipercinético a una cinta de correr con el fin de crear su propio jugo. / Gato limpia minuciosamente la casa preparándose para la visita de Sally.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Dunglap contrata a Perro para que coma su tarea, así realmente puede decir la excusa de que mi perro se comió la tarea. / Perro y Gato se convencen de que una gran nube negra se aproxima y es el fin del mundo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato descubren que Cliff, está asistiendo a clases de ballet. /Randolph reúne a Gato y Perro en el circo. Perro y Gato se presentan al público, pero nadie los aplaude.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato logran conseguir un nuevo trabajo como Perro Bombero en el departamento de bomberos de Nearburg. / Perro entra al espectáculo de perros de Nearburg y se disfraza como un afgano peludo con corte de cabello.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica salva a Carlitos de ser atropellado por un niño en triciclo, ella decide que Carlitos debe ser su esclavo para siempre. / Los bebés admiran a Susie porque ella siempre los defiende de Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica se entera del Hada de los Dientes, planea hacerse rica sacándole los dientes a Carlitos y metiéndolos bajo su propia almohada. / La imaginación de los Rugrats se enciende cuando el Abuelo les lee el cuento de Aladino.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de Randy es invitado a cenar a la casa, los niños piensan que Susie debe mudarse lejos. Fili y Lili deciden que quieren ser diferentes. Fili trata de ser como Carlitos y Lili trata de ser como Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: A Carlitos le van a cortar el pelo por primera vez, pero él le tiene miedo a los cortes de cabello, por lo que los Rugrats y Chas deciden ayudarlo a superar su miedo. Angélica y Susie son enviadas al mismo campamento.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando el triciclo de Susie se pierde y Angélica aparece montando uno idéntico, Susie la acusa de ser una ladrona. Angélica juega al doctor y le dice a Carlitos que tiene una enfermedad que lo convertirá en un rinoceronte.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El Abuelo comienza a sentir que es una molestia y se muda a una casa de retiro que parecía linda por televisión pero termina siendo aburrida. El Abuelo lleva a los Rugrats de campamento en el patio.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de ir al circo, Angélica prepara su propio circo con los Rugrats como los actores. Los Rugrats intentan encontrar un hermanito para Tommy en un huevo abandonado en un nido.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica se pone una crema para la piel que cree que la hace invisible, para tratar de robar postres de la cocina. Después de una mala experiencia, Carlitos decide quedarse adentro de la casa porque Tommy juega muy torpemente.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica es muy mala con los niños, y Tommy desea que algo malo le pase a ella. Angélica se queda en la casa de Tommy cuando sus padres se van de viaje, y hace de cuenta que se le rompió una pierna para que le presten atención.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Buggy gets marooned on an island inhabited by unusual creatures and tangles with the island’s caretaker, Gaimon. If he is to finally destroy Luffy, Buggy must cast his lot with a mysterious woman.

programme.desc: The Buggy Pirates fight each other for the right to take their lost captain’s place. While they’re busy beating each other’s brains out, a cannibalistic tribe makes plans to have something special for dinner.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Usopp finds an amazing pair of sharpshooter’s goggles, but they lead to a run-in with Daddy the Parent – the greatest gunslinger ever! Now, the Straw Hat marksman is headed for the deadliest of all duels.

programme.desc: In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray and his adopted son, Quick, run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. Gangster Bugsy Calhoune pays corrupt cop Phil Cantone to close Club Sugar Ray down.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction

programme.title: Mulholland Falls

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympus

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Japan is going through a seismic crisis after the devastating Tsunami of 2011. We look closely at two very dangerous volcanoes; both are considered to be in the top 5 most dangerous on the planet.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un playboy geriátrico ingresa a la sala de emergencias con una lesión menor que rápidamente se vuelve mortal; y la dieta de jugos de un fanático de la salud lo deja en un estado comatoso.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre que ha sido destrozado por un contenedor de basura apenas se aferra a la vida; Al mismo tiempo, una monja anciana y una prostituta ebria y gritando entran a la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El dolor en la pierna de una mujer embarazada resulta ser un virus carnívoro, que amenaza con su vida y sus extremidades.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El dueño de una joyería de 63 años recibe un disparo en el pecho durante un robo fallido. La reputación de la Dra. Michelle Finkel da un giro, cuando involuntariamente envía al paciente equivocado para una ecografía testicular.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una joven enfermera se derrumba en la sala de emergencias, y sus compañeros de trabajo deben reiniciar su corazón. Un joven padre lleva a su bebé al hospital convencido de que hay gusanos en sus manos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: James Toney vs Charles Williams
programme.desc: On July 29th, 1994 James Toney and Charles Williams battled eachother for IBF World Super Middleweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a knockout victory for James Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Freddie Delgado
programme.desc: On June 18th, 1995 James Toney fought Freddie Delgado at the Performing Arts Theater in New Orleans with the bout ending in the fifth round technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: Jeff Harding vs Dennis Andries
programme.desc: On June 24th, 1989, Jeff Harding fought Dennis Andries for the WBC Light Heavyweight Title in Atlantic City. In an incredible back-and-forth fight with both fighters landing huge power shots, Harding surprisingly stopped Andries in the final round.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On April 15th, 1985, Marvin Hagler fought Thomas Hearns for the undisputed Middleweight Title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. Hagler and Hearns absolutely went at it from the bell which ended with Hagler securing a thrilling knockout victory.

programme.title: Mikaela Mayer vs Ewa Brodnicka
programme.desc: On October 31st, 2020 Mikaela Mayer fought Ewa Brodnicka for the vacant WBO World Super Featherweight due to Brodnicka being overweight and losing her title on the scale but Mayer was able to claim the victory by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Mikaela Mayer vs Maiva Hamadouche
programme.desc: On November 5th, 2021 Mikaela Mayer faced Maiva Hamadouche for the IBF and WBO World Super Featherweight title the 10 round bout ended in a unanimous decision victory for Mayer.

programme.title: Mike Alvarado vs Brandon Rios 2
programme.desc: On March 30th, 2013, Mike Alvarado fought Brandon Rios for the WBO Light Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In the rematch, Alvarado avenged his loss by earning a unanimous decision victory in an absolute battle.

programme.title: Artur Beterbiev vs Joe Smith Jr.
programme.desc: On June 18th, 2022 Artur Beterbiev and Joe Smith Jr faced eachother in a battle for IBF, WBC and WBO World Light Heavyweight title at Madison Square Garden that ended by technical knockout in the second round securing the win for Beterbiev.

programme.title: Eddie Mustafa Muhammad vs Marvin Johnson
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Eddie Mustafa Muhammad fought Marvin Johnson for the WBA World Light Heavyweight title that went 11 out of 15 rounds and ended by technical knockout giving the victory to Muhammad.

programme.title: Efe Ajagba vs Brian Howard
programme.desc: On April 10th, 2021 Efe Ajagba faced Brian Howard at the Osage Casino in Tulsa, Ok. With the fight ending by knockout in the third round securing the win for Ajagba.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Phillip N'dou
programme.desc: On November 1st, 2003 Floyd Mayweather and Phillip N'dou fought eachother for the WBC world lightweight title at the Van Andel Arena in Grand Rapids with Mayweather ending the bout early for a technical knockout victory

programme.title: Juan Manuel Marquez vs Manny Pacquiao 4
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2012, Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for their fourth and final fight. The bout ended in a stunning knockout victory for Marquez, solidifying their rivalry as one of the most memorable in boxing history.

programme.title: Ken Norton vs Muhammad Ali 1
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1973 Ken Norton faced Muhammad Ali at the Sports Arena in San Diego for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles in this 12 round bout Ali suffered a broken jaw and Norton scored a victory over The Greatest.

programme.title: Leon Spinks vs Muhammad Ali 1
programme.desc: On February 15th, 1978 Leon Spinks fought Muhammad Ali for WBA & WBC World Heavyweight titles although Spinks defeated Ali he was stripped of the WBC title as he chose to fight The Greatest, Muhammad Ali instead of the #1 contender Ken Norton.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Erik Morales 1
programme.desc: On March 19th, 2005, Erik Morales fought Manny Pacquiao for the WBC and IBA Super Featherweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight that went the distance, Morales got the best of Pacquiao who seemed to have an off-night.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Jeff Horn
programme.desc: On July 2nd, 2017 Manny Pacquiao battled Jeff Horn for the WBO World Welterweight title at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane in a 12 round bout that ended in a victory for Horn.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard’s feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. The Fabulous, Lana Star sets the record straight against allegations and brings a surprising new client to WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The personalities and conflict have been brewing for weeks, making anything possible in tonight’s Six Women Tag Team Match Main Event with no time limit.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans go wild as new WOW Superhero from the beaches of California, Cali Ray makes her debut. The self-proclaimed 'Grits N Glam' duo Jessie Jones and Amber O’Neal secure a rematch against the team they believe cost them the gold.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard has her aim set on The Beast but firing her attorney, Sophia Lopez creates unexpected obstacles between her and her target.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa into a match against a deadly mystery opponent.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tonight has 'feud' written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star’s past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Will the ghosts of Lana’s past haunt her in the ring forever or does she have a plan to prevail?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Will the spirit of The Lioness be killed by last week’s attack or will she demonstrate the resolve to continue? Jessie Jones uses the Dixie Darlings and a tactical argument to secure a shot at the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: With Keta Rush injured, can Stephy Slays find a new partner to help end Exile’s reign of brutality? The Psycho Sister’s leader Razor was taken out by a vicious and fiery attack last week.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Under suspicious and unusual circumstances, The WOW World Tag Team Championship is on the line tonight. Who will walk away with the most prestigious tag team titles in women’s wrestling?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard finally earns her chance to redeem her loss of the WOW World Championship when she battles The Beast in the Main Event.

programme.title: Origins of WOW
programme.desc: This documentary explores the hardscrabble journey of women wrestlers,from early 20th century carnival sideshows and the male dominated world of professional wrestling,to the ultimate creation of the only all-female wrestling league in the 21st century.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: It's a duel between two dimensions as Zane and Jesse square off in a back-and-forth battle to get back home.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: As Jesse sets his sights on recovering the legendary Rainbow Dragon, Jaden finds himself dueling an unfamiliar friend whose sights are set on revenge.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: It's all or nothing as Jesse and Jaden team up against an enemy from Jaden's past. Can Jesse's Rainbow Dragon lead them to victory, or will their opponent's deck slay this ultimate beast and any hopes they have of getting back home?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Most of the students have returned from the alternate universe only to find that a few of their friends were left behind. Full of guilt, Jaden concocts a dangerous plan to get them back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Having agreed to go find Jesse, Jaden and the gang find themselves journeying through a strange dark world where getting your game on involves risking more than just your life points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: The search for Jesse continues as Jaden battles a fiend named Scarr. Can Jaden defeat this member of the Dark Army, or will this duel send him to the stars?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: After hearing that Jesse may be imprisoned in a camp nearby, Jaden decides to risk everything to try and free his friend.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie lose the iCarly URL to Nevel, he demands Carly kiss him if she wants their URL back. Meanwhile, Spencer has fun with the two hundred pillows he accidentally ordered.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam and Freddie both win a contest for the best locker in school, they are forced to share the same locker. Meanwhile, Carly asks Spencer to give her art lessons.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie present iCarly Awards for best user-generated content, giving the awards to the winners live on the web show. Spencer enlists European swimsuit models to help him make the awards statuettes.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie tries to prove that Melanie, Sam's twin sister, is just Sam in disguise. Meanwhile, when Carly tutors Spencer's nemesis, Chuck, Spencer tries to convince her that Chuck is evil.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: 13-year-old Carly Shay and her friends, Sam and Freddie, create a homemade Web show called iCarly. With Freddie behind the camera and Carly and Sam hosting the show, you never know what to expect!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam accidentally reveals to Carly that she and Freddie shared a secret kiss, Carly confronts them both about why they never told her about it. Meanwhile, Spencer goes to prison to teach an art class to convicts.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie defeat a famous TV chef in a cooking challenge, the chef gives up cooking, quits his show, and refuses to come out of his bedroom. Spencer tries to make his vision of the future a reality.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie accidentally get Principal Franklin fired, Miss Briggs and Mr. Howard take control and enforce harsh rules. Meanwhile, Spencer hires a grizzled old rodeo star to teach him to ride a mechanical bull.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam announces a "take Carly to the dance contest" for an upcoming Girls' Choice dance, so many boys show up that Carly, Sam, and Freddie have to hold a speed-dating session to meet them all.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie agree to make a music video for a pop star who's trying to make a comeback, they discover that she is out of shape and untalented. Spencer has trouble dating a woman when he discovers she's Gibby's mom.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Freddie saves Carly's life, Carly falls in love with him. Meanwhile, Sam and Spencer compete against each other in a paintball game called Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Gibby discovers Freddie and his girlfriend in a compromising position, he vows revenge and challenges Freddie to a fight. Meanwhile, Spencer's art career really takes off when the local paper incorrectly reports his death.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When the gang discovers that Lewbert was once a happy man engaged to a beautiful woman, they set out to reunite the lost lovers. Spencer joins the building watch to catch a thief that's been stealing from the apartments.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam reveals to Carly and Freddie that she used to compete in pageants as a young girl. When she learns that her long-time rival will be competing in Seattle, she convinces Carly to compete against her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam ends up in jail, Carly and Freddie vow that the web show must go on. They try to enlist Spencer's help at that last minute but he has a date he can't cancel.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: An eccentric billionaire asks the iCarly gang to perform the first live web show from outer space. They go through a series of tests to make sure they're fit for space travel. Back at the loft, Spencer is visited by a mysterious little girl.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Bigfoot fever hits Seattle when hikers take some fuzzy footage of a suspicious figure in the woods. After an expert validates the footage on the web show, Carly convinces the gang to go upstate and join the search for Bigfoot.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Fed up with his Mom constantly treating him like a baby, Freddie decides to move out into his own place. The gang starts a successful pet photography business. They end up in a feud with a rival pet photo studio.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When a heatwave hits Seattle and the power goes out, Spencer comes to the rescue with a Norwegian air conditioner.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer tries to surprise Carly for her birthday and ends up burning down her bedroom instead. But when the insurance company hands him a big check, he has a chance to make it up to her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After an iCarly fan proposes to his girlfriend live on the web show, the gang gets roped into going to the wedding. But when the bride gets cold feet, Carly must come to the rescue.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang goes into business making and selling Penny-Tees. After sales go through the roof, Sam recruits 4th-graders to help make shirts. But Carly, Sam, & Freddie disagree about how to treat them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Ridiculed for never pulling a prank, Carly recruits Spencer's help to prank Sam and Freddie. But after Spencer gets a taste for it, he can't stop pranking. The gang must figure out how to stop him.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After fighting with her mom, Sam moves in with Carly, who soon realizes she's a horrible guest. Freddie is stalked by a dangerous criminal after catching him on video committing a crime.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When a video of Nevel yelling at a little girl surfaces on the internet, Nevel becomes hated by everyone. After celebrating Nevel's demise, the iCarly gang then works to restore his honor after Nevel begs them for help.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang decides to hire an intern for the web series. Carly and Sam hire a guy they think is cute, but the new intern proves to be more trouble than he's worth. Freddy has to prove to Carly and Sam that they're better off without him.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang spends the night finishing their projects at Ridgeway during the annual school lock-in. Carly and Freddie start to suspect that Sam might have a crush on their new friend Brad.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iPilot: When Miss Briggs rejects all their favorite contestants from talent show tryouts, Carly and Sam decide to host their talented classmates on their own online web show, iCarly.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iLike Jake: Carly has a crush on a boy at school named Jake. He's really cool and hot. Since Carly likes him, she invites Jake to sing and play guitar on her web show.
